[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeGrid](../../TextmodeGrid.md) / offsetY

# Accessor: offsetY

## Get Signature

```ts
get offsetY(): number;
```

Vertical offset in pixels from the canvas edge to the grid.

### Returns

`number`

### Example
